text.message: You guys made a mistake enabling orange to get that harbor
If you had it it would be game over long time
You have 8 and 10..and would also get 5 easily
Yup plus you have rock and sheep
You really think I would have been stronger than orange is now? I doubt it
You would've destroyed us..had to make a decision
Yeah of course I get that, I just think you made the wrong decision
Maybe I can be wrong but it wasn't deliberate
yeah i thought oj was better to give it to but always can be wrong by the dice
No no I'm not holding a grudge, I just wanted to hear your thoughts
